title: [BUG] Background & border colors change after reading then saving file
author: kasrak
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Hi, I'm seeing this issue on v4.4.0 (seems similar to https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/223)

Here's a sample file:

[sample.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/13291903/sample.xlsx)

When I open and re-save it (no other operations) the background and border colors are changed:

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/331454/e86cab80-e260-41f1-bf99-33adf545d740)

Lib version: 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

```javascript
const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
await workbook.xlsx.load(buffer);
const result = await workbook.xlsx.writeBuffer();
```
